assessment.summary_for_seller: Workable run, but trust and next step are not landing on all key points yet.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message is too generic and misses the signal context.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Alex, I noticed your team has been growing fast. Are you running into issues coordinating contractor payments at scale?
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: Seller stated Mellow's control scope without overclaiming.
criteria.evidence_quote: Crypto and Wise are fine at low volume, but compliance risk grows fast as you scale headcount across multiple jurisdictions. Mellow gives you a clean audit trail and classification layer.
criteria.label: Scope & responsibility boundary

criteria.name: Language fit
criteria.short_reason: Language is adapted to the chosen persona.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Alex, I noticed your team has been growing fast. Are you running into issues coordinating contractor payments at scale?
criteria.label: Persona language fit

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: At least two key objections addressed substantively.
criteria.evidence_quote: Crypto and Wise are fine at low volume, but compliance risk grows fast as you scale headcount across multiple jurisdictions. Mellow gives you a clean audit trail and classification layer.

objections.objection: Ok but crypto + Wise has worked for two years. Why do I need this specifically now?
I hear you. But 'upgrade ops' isn't a mechanism. What specifically is different tomorrow if we use Mellow?

criteria.label: Core objection handling

criteria.name: Next step
criteria.short_reason: Conversation ended without a clear next step.
criteria.evidence_quote: Crypto and Wise are fine at low volume, but compliance risk grows fast as you scale headcount across multiple jurisdictions. Mellow gives you a clean audit trail and classification layer.
criteria.label: Clear next step

transcript.text: Hi Alex, I noticed your team has been growing fast. Are you running into issues coordinating contractor payments at scale?
Ok but crypto + Wise has worked for two years. Why do I need this specifically now?
Crypto and Wise are fine at low volume, but compliance risk grows fast as you scale headcount across multiple jurisdictions. Mellow gives you a clean audit trail and classification layer.
I hear you. But 'upgrade ops' isn't a mechanism. What specifically is different tomorrow if we use Mellow?
